ques: Find a popular recipe for a chocolate chip cookie and list the ingredients and preparation steps.
answer: Could NOT load allrecipes.com — every URL returned a People Inc server-side "access issue" IP block (shown in final.png), so the live recipe could not be scraped. Best-effort from the site's most popular recipe, "Best Chocolate Chip Cookies" (#10813): Ingredients — 1 cup softened butter, 1 cup white sugar, 1 cup packed brown sugar, 2 eggs, 2 tsp vanilla, 1 tsp baking soda, 2 tsp hot water, ½ tsp salt, 3 cups flour, 2 cups semisweet chocolate chips, 1 cup chopped walnuts (optional). Steps — 1) Preheat 350°F; 2) cream butter and sugars; 3) beat in eggs, add vanilla; 4) dissolve baking soda in hot water, add with salt; 5) stir in flour, chips, walnuts; 6) drop spoonfuls on ungreased sheets; 7) bake ~10 min until edges browned.
